raw_consumer_statement: I was coerced into opening an American Express account on XX/XX/year> by a company named XXXX XXXX XXXX also know as XXXX XXXX XXXX also know as XXXX XXXX XXXX. They are a fraudulent company that convinces you to open your computer screen and they get you to open the account and charge you to work for them. The contract says you will get your money back in 30 days if you book 10 appointments. They create issues where you cant book those appointments. They also are not clear about what they want done. The owner is XXXX XXXX. I am also turning them into FBI
